name: Jane Doe
title: Your Professional Title
current: Your Current or Most Recent Role (start - end)
summary: A two to three sentence professional summary. Lead with what you build or own, the scale you operate at, and the kind of problems you solve. This is example placeholder text; replace it with your own.
prevRoles:
Prior Role - Company (dates)
Earlier Role - Company (dates)
dealBreakers:
List anything that is an automatic no for you
One per line
targetCos:
Company A
Company B
Company C
strengths:
List your real accomplishments here, one per line.
Lead with action and outcome.
Include real numbers where you have them.
This is the most important field for scoring accuracy.
Replace all of this with your own background.
gaps:
List skills or areas where you are honestly light.
One per line.
This helps the evaluator score realistically rather than optimistically.
voice: Describe how you want your writing to sound. Example: Direct and specific. Real companies, real numbers. Short paragraphs. No corporate filler.
samples: Optional: paste a sentence or two in your own voice as a style reference.
avoid: Optional: words or phrases you never want to appear in generated text.
